product_overview: Relay is a mobile-first web marketplace for gadget swaps where authenticated users browse swaps, create or get matched into swaps, and coordinate via integrated messaging with read receipts. The app surface in this PRD focuses on the main dashboard, swap creation/matching, messaging, and an auth placeholder used during development.
core_goals: Provide a single, authenticated main dashboard (/) for browsing and managing active and pending swaps.
Enable users to initiate a swap and be matched via server-side logic (/api/swaps/get-or-create) with clear success and failure states.
Support contextual messaging inside swap threads with read receipts and mark-as-read behavior (/api/messages/mark-read).
Surface a development placeholder for authentication flows while a full signup/login implementation is completed.

features.name: Swap Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard (/) where authenticated users browse, filter, inspect, and manage active and pending swaps and jump to swap-specific actions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> App checks auth state -> See list of active and pending swaps on dashboard -> Use filter control to select a status (e.g., Active) -> See swaps list update to reflect the filter -> Click a swap card to open swap details -> See swap details and contextual action buttons (Confirm / Arrange Pickup / Message)
Navigate to / -> App checks auth state -> If unauthenticated: Redirect to /sign-up-or-login-placeholder -> See message indicating authentication is required to access the dashboard

features.name: Swap Creation and Matching
features.description: From the main experience users can initiate a swap or be matched into an existing swap using the server endpoint POST /api/swaps/get-or-create; the UI reflects creation and matching state changes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Find a listing or active swap suggestion -> Click 'Swap' or 'Confirm participation' CTA on the listing or banner -> See confirmation modal and tap Confirm -> Client sends POST /api/swaps/get-or-create -> Receive successful match response -> See swap appear in dashboard list with status 'pending' and swap details available

Navigate to / -> Tap 'Swap' on a listing -> See confirmation modal and tap Confirm -> Client sends POST /api/swaps/get-or-create -> API returns error 'insufficient credits' or match failure -> See inline error message 'Insufficient credits' and actions 'Add credits' or 'Cancel' displayed -> Tap Cancel to return to listing

features.name: Messaging and Read Receipts
features.description: Conversation threads are available from the dashboard and listing context; users can scroll messages, send messages, and messages are marked read when viewing the thread (POST /api/messages/mark-read).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> On an active swap banner or swap card tap 'Message' -> Conversation thread opens (embedded or navigated) -> Scroll through existing messages -> Type message in input field -> Click Send -> New message appears in thread with timestamp -> On opening the thread client calls POST /api/messages/mark-read -> Unread count badge in nav decreases

Navigate to / -> Tap 'Message' on a swap card -> Conversation thread opens -> Type message -> Click Send -> Client POST to send message fails (network or server) -> Show error toast 'Message failed to send' with Retry button -> Click Retry -> Message resend attempt occurs

features.name: Authentication Placeholder
features.description: A development placeholder route (/sign-up-or-login-placeholder) that informs users that full signup/login flows are pending and prevents access to protected functionality until proper auth is available.
user_flows: Navigate to /sign-up-or-login-placeholder -> See placeholder page messaging that authentication is required or pending implementation -> Tap provided link or CTA to view recommended next steps (e.g., go to /login or contact support)
Navigate to /sign-up-or-login-placeholder -> Attempt to sign up via placeholder CTA -> See inline notice 'Not implemented' and a link to an alternate auth method or support contact

routes.description: Main Relay swap dashboard and messaging experience

features.name: Swap Dashboard
features.description: Users can browse, filter, and manage swaps on the main dashboard.
user_interactions: View list of active and pending swaps
Filter or sort swaps (e.g. by status or recency)
Open a swap to view detailed information
Navigate between different sections of the dashboard

features.name: Swap Creation and Matching
features.description: Users can initiate or get matched into a swap via server-side logic.
user_interactions: Initiate a new swap from the main experience
Confirm participation in a suggested swap
See swap state update after creation or matching

features.name: Messaging and Read Receipts
features.description: Users can exchange messages in the context of a swap and mark messages as read.
user_interactions: Mark messages as read when viewing the thread

features.name: Authentication Placeholder
features.description: Temporary placeholder route for sign up or login flows used during development.
user_interactions: View messaging indicating auth is required or pending implementation

known_limitations.issue: Authentication flow is currently a placeholder and not a full signup/login implementation.
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot complete real authentication via this route and must rely on alternate or development auth mechanisms.
